call_log_level.description: Specifies the logging level for workflow execution calls, such as 'none', 'log-all-calls', or 'errors-only'.

crypto_key_name.description: Specifies the name of the Cloud KMS crypto key used to encrypt workflow data, must follow the format projects/{project}/locations/{location}/keyRings/{keyRing}/cryptoKeys/{cryptoKey}.

deletion_protection.description: Defines whether the workflow is protected from accidental deletion; set to true to enable protection.

description.description: Defines the workflow's description, providing context about its purpose and functionality; must not exceed 500 characters.

execution_history_level.description: Specifies the level of execution history to retain for the workflow; valid values are "BASIC" or "FULL".

labels.description: Key-value pairs used to organize and categorize the workflow, typically for identification, filtering, or grouping purposes. Maximum 64 labels, with keys and values limited to 63 characters each.

name.description: Specifies the unique name of the workflow, must be compliant with Google Cloud's naming conventions.

name_prefix.description: Defines the prefix to be used for naming the workflow, ensuring uniqueness and compliance with naming conventions.

service_account.description: Defines the IAM service account used to execute the workflow, requiring necessary permissions for resources accessed during workflow execution.

source_contents.description: Defines the contents of the workflow source code, typically in YAML or JSON format. This must contain valid workflow logic.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize the workflow, with a maximum of 64 tags allowed.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout configuration for the workflow, specifying durations for create, update, and delete operations.

user_env_vars.description: Environment variables to be set for the workflow; must be key-value pairs in string format.
